catalog_content:
Item Name: SERIOUS Bean Co Southwest Smokehouse Black Beans, Fully Cooked, Plant-Based Canned Beans, 12-Pack of 15.5 Oz. Cans
Bullet Point 1: Great for BBQ, tailgating and everyday meals.
Bullet Point 2: Mild heat.
Bullet Point 3: Perfect balance of smoky and sweet, for a southwest-inspired side dish.
Bullet Point 4: Made with the best beans from America’s Heartland.
Bullet Point 5: Fully cooked. Shelf-stable.
Bullet Point 6: Vegetarian. Vegan. Gluten-free recipe.
Bullet Point 7: Delicious source of fiber and plant protein.
Bullet Point 8: Non-BPA. Pop-top lid.
Bullet Point 9: No preservatives and no high fructose corn syrup.
Bullet Point 10: 12-pack of cans. Each can is 15.5 Ounces.
Product Description: SERIOUS Bean Co Southwest Smokehouse Black Beans will have you seeing turquoise. They’ve got all the best Southwestern flavors: ancho chilies, smoked paprika, turmeric, and secret spices. (We know a guy.) These beans don’t burn – they sizzle, leaving just a tiny twinge of heat in your throat. But just when you need it most, a kernel of sweet corn takes the edge off. Part BBQ, part southwestern, and all seriously delicious, Southwest Smokehouse Black Beans are soaked in a rich, smoky sauce. Perfect for pairing with smoked meats and veggies of all kinds or satisfying enough to eat like a meal – if you’re into that. This brand-new recipe meant countless rounds of taste testing. Ace ate batch after batch until we finally hit on a recipe so good, we had to share it with the world. Southwest Smokehouse was born, and Ace is fine now. UN-BORING your meals. Spice up your table with SERIOUS Bean Co Southwest Smokehouse Black Beans. Always ORIGINAL. Always BOLD. Always DELICIOUS. SERIOUS Bean Co offers a variety of diverse flavors including Sweet and a Bit Sassy Dr Pepper Baked Beans, Southwest Smokehouse Black Beans with Supersweet Corn & Real Ancho Chili Pepper, Jalapeno & Bacon Pinto Beans, Carolina Gold BBQ Beans, Sweet & Smoky Chipotle Pinto Beans with Tomatoes and Adobo Spices, Hot Honey Baked Beans and Buckin’ Buffalo Black Beans.
Value: 186.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Mid-tier branded canned beans with a flavorful, southwest-inspired profile. Bulk 12-pack offers value per unit, though no premium or organic claims are visible. Metal can packaging is standard for shelf-stable foods, and the product positions itself as a versatile, everyday ingredient rather than a premium or specialty item.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Davidson's Organics, Coconut Vanilla, 100-count Unwrapped Tea Bags
Bullet Point 1: Coconut Vanilla combines vanilla essence and coconut flakes with a base of creamy chicory, barley and South African rooibos, making the blend a perfect caffeine-free dessert alternative with only 3 calories per cup. Davidson's Coconut Vanilla is a rich, buttery herbal blend with coconut top notes and vanilla undertones.
Bullet Point 2: LEAF TO CUP: From our farms in India to your family, Davidson’s Organics is a vertically integrated provider of premium teas at affordable prices. We grow, import, blend, package, and sell - overseeing the entire journey of our tea from the leaf cuttings to the infusion in your cup.
Bullet Point 3: ALWAYS ORGANIC: Davidson’s Organics is a 3rd generation organic tea grower delivering on its promise of providing top-notch USDA certified organic teas. Our teas are grown non-GMO & free from harmful chemicals and pesticides. We are responsibly sourced and sustainably farmed. We believe in the holistic health of our farms, farmers, plants & animals.
Bullet Point 4: A CUP OF WELLNESS: Davidson’s offers a diverse selection of tea blends for the most discerning palates. From loose leaves to tea bags & iced, and from ayurvedic to herbal, our organic teas deliver the perfect pick me up or a restful respite. Enjoy our balanced tea blends for optimal health and sipping pleasure.
Bullet Point 5: TRUST OUR TEA: Davidson's Organics was the first purveyor of fine organic teas. Since 1976, we’ve worked tirelessly to develop blends that are true reflections of their names, while being committed to sourcing healthy ingredients grown by generations of skilled small farmers. Enjoy Davidson's Organics, the organic tea that sets the standards for the highest quality.
Value: 100.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Premium organic tea brand with USDA certification, positioned as a high-quality, health-focused product. The blend includes organic ingredients and is marketed as a caffeine-free dessert alternative, indicating a niche but potentially higher-priced segment. Vertically integrated supply chain and third-generation organic farming suggest strong brand trust and quality control.
